summary: Iteration 22: camelCase/snake_case consolidation testing. Found and fixed 11 snake_case regression bugs introduced or missed during the consolidation. Most critical: missing getRefereeStatus export from conflictUtils.js caused a full app crash (ErrorBoundary). After fixes, all 15 requested test scenarios pass with zero console errors.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Missing getRefereeStatus export — imported by GameAssignmentsTab.jsx and Schedule/GameCard.jsx. Caused full app crash via ErrorBoundary: 'does not provide an export named getRefereeStatus'
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added getRefereeStatus(referee, targetGame, allGames) function using getScheduleConflicts + checkAvailabilitySlots, returns { status, conflicts }

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: assignment.profiles?.name — assigned referee name shows '...' because mapGame returns assignment.referee.name, not assignment.profiles.name
referee?.avatar_url (snake_case) — pending connection cards showed broken avatar images
manager.league_name, manager.active_tournaments, m.league_name, requestTarget?.league_name — all snake_case, fields show undefined after mapProfile consolidation
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed all to camelCase: leagueName, activeTournaments

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: user?.games_officiated (snake_case) — showed '0 Games' instead of actual count
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed to user?.gamesOfficiated (after also fixing buildUser to expose camelCase alias)

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: buildUser only exposed avatarUrl camelCase alias but not gamesOfficiated, leagueName, activeTournaments. After Profile.jsx fix, games count showed 0.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added gamesOfficiated, leagueName, activeTournaments camelCase aliases to buildUser

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: After avatar upload, local user state only updated avatar_url but not avatarUrl. UI wouldn't reflect new avatar until page reload.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Updated setUser to set both avatar_url and avatarUrl

test_results.roster_pending_avatarUrl_gamesOfficiated: PASS — no pending requests in test data; connected referees showing correctly
test_results.calendar_availability_startTime_endTime: PASS — green dots showing on correct days
test_results.settings_aria_role_switch: PASS — 7 toggle buttons with role=switch and aria-checked
test_results.profile_avatarUrl_gamesOfficiated: PASS — avatar img loading, 45 games showing
test_results.no_console_errors: PASS — 0 console errors across all pages

critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: conflictUtils.js getRefereeStatus was dropped during camelCase refactor but still imported by 2 consumers — caused full app crash. Always audit all consumers when removing exports.

buildUser in AuthContext.jsx now exposes camelCase aliases for the 4 key fields (avatarUrl, gamesOfficiated, leagueName, activeTournaments). If more profile fields are added, they need the same treatment OR use mapProfile() directly in buildUser.
GameAssignmentsTab referenced assignment.profiles?.name (Supabase-style) instead of assignment.referee?.name (mapGame return shape) — mismatch between component and mapper.
context_for_next_testing_agent: camelCase consolidation (Issue #10) is complete and all 15 test scenarios pass. The getRefereeStatus export was the critical blocker — now added to conflictUtils.js. buildUser in AuthContext now exposes 4 camelCase field aliases. All 6 source files updated. No console errors. App is stable.
rca_of_issues: Root cause: During the camelCase/snake_case consolidation, firestoreService.js mappers and conflictUtils.js were rewritten to use camelCase internally, but (1) conflictUtils.js accidentally dropped the getRefereeStatus export that 2 consumer files still imported; (2) several UI components in RosterTab, FindManagers, Profile were not updated to match the new camelCase field names; (3) buildUser in AuthContext only partially exposed camelCase aliases. Fix: Added missing export, updated all consuming components, extended buildUser aliases.
